curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/hdr/decoder.rs (1 file). The vulnerability is in read_image_transform which uses unsafe Vec::set_len on an uninitialized vector with a user-provided type parameter T. If T implements Drop and a panic occurs during scanline reading or the scoped thread pool execution, Drop runs on uninitialized memory (use-after-free). The fix changes the interface to accept a pre-allocated &mut [T] slice, eliminating the unsafe set_len call. No sibling files share this pattern — encoder.rs and mod.rs do not use set_len with generic type parameters. Pre-assigned class use-after-free is correct per CWE-416 and the advisory description.
